Thinkers Dilemma
Content Studio
Sign in with your authorized Google account to access the studio.
Only authorized accounts can access the studio. Configure in the Distribution Hub ↗
⚠ Auth not configured — running in dev mode  ·  Setup in Distribution Hub ↗
TD Substack Studio
← Live site Distribute ↗ Saved
Site & Issue

These values appear on every page — masthead, utility bar, footer, and dateline.

Lead Story

The headline story on the front page. Fields marked HTML accept <em>, <br> etc.

Issue Plate
Pull Quote
Subscribe Block
Essays

Newest first. The first item is the lead story. Use the RSS Import tab to pull directly from Substack.

Episodes

The first item with featured: true appears as the hero on the episodes page.

Field Notes

Key pullquotes — one per essay.

Page Intros

The masthead header for each listing page.

Transmission Ticker

The scrolling strip below the utility bar. ✦ star and Hot flags are optional.

Footer
Footer Columns

Three link columns — label + URL per row.

RSS Import

Fetch the latest posts from thinkersdilemma.substack.com/feed and import them directly into your content. Items already in your essays list are shown as already imported. After importing, switch to the Essays tab to review and edit, then Export.

Press "Fetch from Substack" to load the latest posts.
